title: Infosys Completes CMMI AI Maturity Pilot Assessment
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it collaborated with CMMI Institute on the CMMI AI Maturity framework and was among the first organizations globally to complete the pilot assessment. The document emphasizes Infosys' AI governance, responsible deployment practices, enterprise-scale AI implementation, and use of Infosys Topaz, but does not disclose financial impact, contract value, or new guidance.

key_facts.fact: Infosys successfully completed and contributed to the CMMI AI Maturity (AIM) Framework and Pilot Assessment conducted by CMMI Institute.
Infosys was among the first select group of organizations recognized globally to complete the pilot assessment.
The pilot assessment covered AI-augmented software development, maintenance, testing, and support initiatives across Infosys' service lines and global delivery hubs.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys is among the first select group of organizations recognized globally to complete the pilot assessment
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main recognition disclosed in the document.
